title: Mix Optimize
body:
· Added many 3D model for Crop and block.

· Make the Spawn eggs to 3D.

· Replace the Vanilla enchantment books with a more easily distinguishable dynamic enchantment books.

· Replace the Vanilla weapons/tools enchantment with a more easily distinguishable dynamic weapon/tool 
  enchantment.

· Replace the Vanilla weapon/tools durability with a more easily distinguishable weapon/tools durability.

· Some items have dynamic effects

· Change gui to make the color darker

· Replace the Vanilla potions with a more easily distinguishable dynamic potions.

· Replace the Vanilla suspicious stews with a more easily distinguishable dynamic suspicious stews.

· Shield and Flame effects are reduced in view.

· Reduce block particles, will not obstruct the view.

· Brewing stand gui can view the Vanilla all recipes.

· Tooltips now support for larger levels of enchantment and potion

There are many functions waiting for you to discover!

This texture pack requires CIT Resewn and Continuity.
